title: Luffy Carries Oden’s Will Forward
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Big Mom, Kaido as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems this skirmish is the result of a grudge that has fostered within wano for the past 20 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: After Doflamingo's defeat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...A clash between Kaido and the worst generation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: became inevitable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But it almost seems like FA7E conspired...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to make allies of the Samuel and these pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world is about to undergo a drastic shift.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If two of the emperors were to fall here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The future would definitely become uncertain. But that outcome is impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: > Ben; jbe-being

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The invaders are 5400 men strong,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But 400 have already fallen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Our associates have 30,000 men...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: and 3000 casualties,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm... the Samural have done pretty well considering the odds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they tried the direct approach with their numbers, it would have been impossible to reach the opposing general.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Launching a surprise raid was a brilliant move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That said, in this war...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Simply assessing the enemy's leadership is unlikely to settle the conflict!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An all out war is unfolding across the whole island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And there's no way out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they do nothing to counter the might of Kaido's EXECUTIVES...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They stand to lose hundreds of troops at a time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this new generation is unable to stand against the executives...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will be like getting surrounded by black stones on a go board. They'll be finished.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This confrontation is developing as expected.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please continue to do your utmost to take each other out... my dear pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What the hell is that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is that Kaido...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It must be his "hybrid" form!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Hey, Linlin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is getting fun! Woro- RORORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: MaaaaAA- Mamamama hahaha...!! you know, Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I was just thinking the same thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: -No break next week.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 35 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
